text: Dow tumbles 500 points, enters correction territory as Trump's Iran extension fails to soothe markets: Live updates - CNBC
fullText: Wall Street is coming off a losing session in which higher oil prices and spiking Treasury yields weighed on equities.

text: House panel finds Rep. Sheila Cherfilus-McCormick guilty of 25 ethics charges - NBC News
fullText: A House Ethics subcommittee found Rep. Sheila Cherfilus-McCormick guilty of 25 ethics charges, capping a three-year investigation into allegations she stole millions in federal relief funds and funneled some of that to her congressional campaign.

text: Iran's response to U.S. peace proposal expected Friday, sources say - CBS News
fullText: The Iranian response to the U.S.' 15-point peace proposal is expected on Friday, multiple sources familiar with the matter told CBS News.

text: Apple has finally discontinued the Mac Pro desktop after years of fitful effort - Ars Technica
fullText: M2 Ultra Mac Pro is no longer for sale, and Apple says no replacement is planned.

text: Funding TSA won’t fix long airport lines overnight - CNN
fullText: Funding to pay Transportation Security Administration officers may be on its way soon, but despite this, frontline workers and hours-long lines of travelers at US airports may not return to normal right away.

text: Even wealthy Americans are souring on the economy as gas prices spike and stocks fall - CNN
fullText: Americans are growing more pessimistic about the US economy as the war on Iran continues to roil markets, with sentiment falling across all income groups — including the wealthiest.

text: Does Anyone Remember Laura Nyro? - Rolling Stone
fullText: Laura Nyro was a hugely influential singer-songwriter, but are her complex life and incredible legacy at risk of being forgotten?

text: Trump's paused attack on Iran's energy - for diplomacy or escalation? - BBC
fullText: The US president's commitment to deadlines is fluid but he uses them for a purpose, writes the BBC's James Landale.

text: Android 17 Beta 3 finally restores the single tap Wi-Fi toggle - 9to5Google
fullText: Google has decided to restore the ability to enable and disable Wi-Fi connections with a single tap of the QS toggle in Android 17 Beta 3.

text: Iran starts to formalize its chokehold on the Strait of Hormuz with a ‘toll booth’ regime - AP News
fullText: Iran is cementing its hold over the Strait of Hormuz, demanding vessels give up detailed information and detour into Iranian waters before being vetted by Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps. In some cases, vessels have paid for passage. Traffic through…

text: DHS funding bill moves to House after early morning passage in Senate - The Washington Post
fullText: Lawmakers have felt pressured to make a deal because of lengthy security checkpoint delays at some airports.

text: Sony is raising PS5 prices by $100 in April - The Verge
fullText: Sony is raising the prices across all of its PS5 models, with the standard version costing $649.99 instead of $549.99.

text: Anthropic accidentally leaked details of a new AI model that poses unprecedented cybersecurity risks - Fortune
fullText: Everything you need to know before you reach the office this morning.

text: U.S. uses hundreds of Tomahawk missiles on Iran, alarming some at Pentagon - The Washington Post
fullText: More than 850 Tomahawks have been fired in just four weeks, people familiar with the matter said, alarming some Pentagon officials because the weapon’s supply is limited.

text: Protests from Alabama to Wyoming — and on the Arctic Circle: What to know about Saturday’s third ‘No Kings’ rally - CNN
fullText: Millions of people are expected to join a national rally on Saturday to protest President Donald Trump’s policies, event organizers say.

text: Ex-FBI Agent Reveals Why Savannah Guthrie’s Interview Will Leave Her Mother’s Abductors ‘Terrified’ - Yahoo News UK
fullText: A former FBI agent has revealed that Savannah Guthrie's emotional interview will leave her mom's suspected abductor "terrified."

text: Trey Kaufman-Renn's late tip-in sends Purdue to Elite Eight - On3
fullText: Trey Kaufman-Renn tip-in with 0.7 seconds to left gave the Boilermakers a 79-77 victory over Texas in teh Sweet 16

text: Nepal’s youngest premier sworn in after releasing new rap song about unity - Al Jazeera
fullText: At 35, Balen Shah becomes Nepal’s first Madhesi prime minister, representing the southern plains bordering India.
